title: Kamali
subTitle: Kamali and Ningi attempt to recover Annapurna's jewellery, countering Kamini's plot. However, their secret operation is thwarted when Kamini catches them red-handed.

title: Veen Doghantali Hi Tutena
subTitle: Swanandi rushes to help Anand, who's locked himself in a room and is considering suicide, while Samar tries to stop her. Meanwhile, Mallika stirs up Samar's anger even more.

title: Tula Japnar Aahe
subTitle: After Ambika's tragic death, her husband Atharva and daughter Veda are heartbroken. However, her spirit returns to watch over and protect Veda in unseen yet powerful ways.

subTitle: Jamkar explains taking Saket out to Sudhakar. However, when Saket mentions seeing Gopal, a panicked Gopal chases their car, leading Jamkar to uncover the truth about Saket's accident.

title: Calvary Swar
subTitle: A renowned religious scholar delivers a discourse describing Jesus's crucifixion and encourages followers to lead a pious life.
